(2) Thcy shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazctte . 2. Dclinitions, - In these mles, unless the context otherwise requires,- (l) "Forum" means 'Fomm of regulators' as constituted under rule 3; (2) "Act" means the 'Electricity Act, 2003 (No.36 of 2003). (3) Words and expressions used herein and not defined, but defined in lhe Act, shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them in the said Act. Constihrtion of the Forum.- (l) The Forum shall consist of the Chairperson of the Cenlral Commissron anti Chairpersons of rhe Siale Cuuuirissisiis. Tt^c Chairperson of the Central Commission shall be the Chairperson of thc Forurn of Regulators. @ The Secretary to the Central Commissioo shall be the ex-oficio Secretary to the Forum. (3) Secretarial assist nce to the l-orurn shall be provided by the Cental Commissioo. (4) The headquarter ofthe Forum will be locacd at New Delhi. 4 (iD (iiD (iv) analysis of the tariff orders and other orders of Central Commission and Stat€ Commissions and compilation of data arising out of the said orders, highlighting, espeeially the efficiurcy improvem'ents of the utilities; harmonization of regulation in power sector; laying of staldards of performance of licensees as required under the Act. sharing of information among the members of the Forum on various issues of common interest and also of cornmon aooroach. undertaking rescarch work in-house or through outsourcing on issues rtlevant to power sector rEgulation; erolving me&iures for protection of interest of consumers and promotion of efficiency, economy and competition in power sector; and such other fi:nctions as the Ccntal Govemment may assign to it, from time to time. (v) (vi) (vi!) J (i) Functions of the Forum.- The Forum shall discbarge the following functions, namely:- -- 3 of 4 -- 5. Finrncqs of the Forum.- (l) The Central Commission may take necessary financial conlributions from the State Commissions for carrying out the activities of the Forum. (2) The Central Commission will keep separate accounts for the activities of the Forum. 6. Meetings of the Forum.- ( I ) The Forum shall meet at least twice in a year. (2) The Forum will ftame its own rules ofbusiness for the conduct ofits meetings. 7 Annual Report .- The Forum of Regulators shall prepare every year, an annual report, giving a summary of its activrties during the previous financial year and copies ofthe report shall be forwarded to the Central Government.
